LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DAVID CHOO AND CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE AND REALTY, INC'S SECOND AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY ACTION. COUNSEL APPEARED IN DEPARTMENT 301 THIS MORNING IN A DIFFERENT CASE (#492051) BUT ON THE SAME MOTION AS THIS ONE. JUDGE BUSCH CONTINUED HIS MATTER FOR FURTHER BRIEFING. THIS COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ADOPTED JUDGE BUSCH'S RULING/BRIEFING SCHEDULE CONTINUING THE MATTER. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO 10/21/10. DEFENDANTS TO SUBMIT SUPPLEMENTAL PAPERS BY 10/04/10. PLAINTIFFS RESPONSE DUE 10/12/10. DEFENDANTS REPLY DUE 10/15/10. (IN ADDITION, THE COURT INDICATED THAT PLAINTIFFS LATE FILED SUBMISSIONS TO BE BEFORE THE COURT.) MR. BORNSTEIN TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

UNLESS THE PARTIES CHOOSE OTHERWISE, THE PARTIES WILL PROCEED TO AAA. THE REMAINDER OF THE CASE IS STAYED. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO AN ARBITRATOR, EITHER THROUGH AAA OR JAMS. IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON AN ARBITRATOR, THEY MAY BRING A MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP 1281.6. (DUE TO THE LENGTH OF ARGUMENT, PER DIEM FEES WERE ASSESSED.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Continued To Dec-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

2nd Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Action
Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS DAVID CHOO AND CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE AND REALTY, INC.'S 2ND AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY ACTION. Appearances: Jonathan Bornstein of Bornstein and Bornstein (409.7611) for plaintiff and responding party; Richard Gallagher and Alex Talarites of Orrick Herrington & Sutcliffe (650.614.7387) for defendants and moving parties. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted, except for the request for injunctive relief under B&P 17200. Unless the parties choose otherwise, the parties will proceed to AAA. The remainder of the case is stayed. Parties to meet and confer as to an arbitrator, either through AAA or JAMS. If the parties cannot agree on an arbitrator, they may bring a motion pursuant to CCP 1281.6. Due to the length of argument, per diem fees were assessed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR #5797

2nd Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Action
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Continued To Oct-21-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS DAVID CHOO AND CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE AND REALTY, INC.'S SECOND AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY ACTION.

APPEARANCES: Jonathan Herschel Bornstein, Esq. of The Law Offices of Bornstein & Bornstein 409-7611 for pltfs & opposing parties; Richard Gallagher, Esq. & Alexander Talarides, Esq. of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP 773-5991 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Counsel appeared in Department 301 this morning in a different case (#492051) but on the same motion as this one. Judge Busch continued his matter for further briefing. This Court vacated its tentative ruling and adopted Judge Busch's ruling/briefing schedule continuing the matter. The Court continued the matter to 10/21/10. Defendants to submit supplemental papers by 10/04/10. Plaintiffs response due 10/12/10. Defendants reply due 10/15/10. (In addition, the Court indicated that plaintiffs late filed submissions to be before the Court.) Mr. Bornstein to prepare order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Defendant'S Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Trowbridge (no card submitted) for defendants and moving parties

No other appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS DAVID CHOO AND CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE AND REALTY INC'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING DETERMINATION OF DEFENDANTS' PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND CONCLUSION OF SUCH ARBITRATION is granted. On September 3, 2010 the court determined that this action is stayed per C.C.P. section 1281.4. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion Andm Motion For Order Compelling Defts California Mortgage And Realty, Inc. To Attend, Testify And Produce Documents At Deposition, Provide Respponses To Form Interrogatories And Respond And Produce Docuiments To Document Demand And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS SPYRIDON JOHN STROUZAS, IRENE STROUZAS, BESTIE J. STROUZAS, TRUSTEE OF THE STROUZAS REVOCABLE TRUST AGREEMENT DATED JULY 2, 1986, BARBARA F. STROUZAS, CLAREMONT TOWERS APARTMENTS, L.P., PENELOPE TAMM, MENDOCINO MANOR, LTD., L.P., GEORGE CHILIANIS, AND MARIA CHILIANIS' MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE AND REALTY, INC., TO ATTEND, TESTIFY AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS AT DEPOSITION, PROVIDE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND RESPOND AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS TO DOCUMENT DEMAND AND IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Jeff D. Trowbridge, Esq. 510/893-5300 for defts & opposing parties; Jonathan Herschel Bornstein, Esq. of Bornstein & Bornstein 409-7611 for pltfs & moving parties (appeared at 9:30 not 9:00 believing matter was on for 9:30; matter was recalled after law & motion calendar & heard).

RULING: Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling and adopted as follows: off calendar. Action stayed pursuant to C.C.P. Section 1281.4. The court notes that it granted the petition to compel arbitration on 8/27/10 as unopposed. The court vacates the 8/27/10 ruling because it appears that the parties intended for the motion to compel arbitration to be heard on 9/30/10. Order signed in open court. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
